title: Aureline worktree-row registry vocabulary
description: Boundary schema for the worktree-row record family frozen in docs/vcs/git_state_and_worktree_contract.md. One worktree_row_record pins which worktree a surface is operating on (worktree_kind_class drawn from the closed four-value vocabulary, worktree_path_ref opaque locator, bound_branch_id_ref optional, head_revision_id_ref optional, worktree_workset_cleanliness_class drawn from the closed five-value vocabulary so sparse / cone / partial-clone surfaces label cleanliness honestly, worktree_registry_lifecycle_state drawn from the closed seven-value vocabulary, optional worktree_removal_class drawn from the closed five-value vocabulary, worktree_removal_review_sheet_class drawn from the closed four-value vocabulary so a single generic 'remove' action is mechanically forbidden, optional in_progress_history_operation_state_id_ref required when the lifecycle is registered_active_with_in_progress_operation or registered_paused_pending_conflict). One audit stream (worktree_row) carries the closed denial-reason and event-id vocabularies. Worktree removal cannot blur metadata-only removal, filesystem deletion, and path-preserve behaviour behind one generic action; the schema's allOf gates pin the removal class against the lifecycle and the matching review sheet against the removal class. Raw absolute paths, raw branch / commit / remote URLs, raw author identity strings, and raw approval-ticket bodies MUST NOT appear on any record emitted against this schema. The eventual git-service crate's Rust types are the schema of record; this file is the cross-tool boundary every non-owning surface reads. Adding a new record kind, worktree-kind class, registry-lifecycle state, removal class, review-sheet class, workset-cleanliness class, denial reason, or audit-event id is additive-minor and bumps worktree_row_schema_version; repurposing an existing value is breaking and requires a new decision row.

worktree_row_schema_version.description: Integer schema version for the worktree-row vocabulary. Current value is 1. Bumped only on breaking payload changes; additive-optional fields do not bump this version.

record_kind.description: Discriminator for the concrete payload shape. Every record carries exactly one kind.

opaque_id.description: Opaque, stable id safe to log, safe on RPC, safe in manifests / journal entries / support bundles. Raw absolute paths, raw branch / commit / remote URLs, raw author identity strings, and raw approval-ticket bodies never appear here.

monotonic_timestamp.description: ISO 8601 UTC timestamp produced from a monotonic clock source.

reviewable_label.description: Redaction-aware reviewable label (<= 1024 graphemes). Carries a presentation-only summary for support / audit; never carries the raw payload.

policy_context.description: Policy context the record was minted under.

worktree_kind_class.description: Frozen worktree-kind vocabulary. worktree_imported_handoff_snapshot_view_only and worktree_synthetic_recovery_view_only forbid mutations through this row; the schema enforces this through the worktree_view_only_mutation_forbidden denial.

worktree_workset_cleanliness_class.description: Frozen workset-cleanliness vocabulary. Anything other than full_worktree_cleanliness MUST surface the workset-limited cue on the chip; a row that renders 'clean' without the matching disclosure denies with workset_cleanliness_must_match_chip_disclosure.

worktree_registry_lifecycle_state.description: Frozen worktree-registry lifecycle vocabulary. worktree_registered_active_with_in_progress_operation and worktree_registered_paused_pending_conflict MUST cite a non-null in_progress_history_operation_state_id_ref. worktree_pending_removal_user_review_required MUST cite a non-null worktree_removal_class and a non-review_sheet_not_applicable_no_removal_pending worktree_removal_review_sheet_class. worktree_removed_metadata_only_admin_directory_pruned MUST cite worktree_removal_class = worktree_removal_metadata_only_admin_directory_pruned; worktree_removed_filesystem_deleted_admin_directory_pruned MUST cite worktree_removal_class = worktree_removal_filesystem_deletion_admin_directory_pruned.

worktree_removal_class.description: Frozen worktree-removal vocabulary. worktree_removal_metadata_only_admin_directory_pruned prunes only the admin entry under .git/worktrees; the working directory is preserved. worktree_removal_filesystem_deletion_admin_directory_pruned prunes the admin entry and removes the working directory from disk. worktree_removal_path_preserve_admin_directory_pruned_only prunes the admin entry; the working directory is explicitly preserved with an acknowledgement event on the audit stream. worktree_removal_blocked_pending_export_for_handoff and worktree_removal_blocked_pending_in_progress_operation_resolution forbid removal until the blocking condition resolves.

worktree_removal_review_sheet_class.description: Frozen worktree-removal-review-sheet vocabulary. review_sheet_metadata_only_vs_filesystem_deletion_distinction_required pairs with worktree_removal_metadata_only_admin_directory_pruned or worktree_removal_filesystem_deletion_admin_directory_pruned; review_sheet_path_preserve_explicit_user_acknowledgement_required pairs with worktree_removal_path_preserve_admin_directory_pruned_only; review_sheet_blocked_pending_in_progress_operation_resolution pairs with worktree_removal_blocked_pending_in_progress_operation_resolution. A row whose pair is mismatched denies with worktree_removal_review_sheet_class_required_for_removal_class.

worktree_row_denial_reason.description: Frozen denial-reason vocabulary on the worktree_row audit stream.

worktree_row_audit_event_id.description: Frozen audit-event ids on the worktree_row stream. worktree_row_audit_denial_emitted MUST cite a worktree_row_denial_reason.

workspace_id_ref.description: Opaque ref to the workspace row in schemas/workspace/* the worktree is bound to.

worktree_path_ref.description: Opaque locator into the workspace family for the worktree's filesystem path. Raw absolute paths never appear here.

bound_branch_id_ref.description: Opaque ref to the branch_row_record the worktree currently checks out. Null when the worktree's bound branch class is detached_head_state_no_branch_label or when the worktree is a view-only row not bound to a branch.

head_revision_id_ref.description: Opaque ref to the worktree's head revision. Null when the worktree has not yet been pinned to a revision.

worktree_removal_class.description: Required (non-null) when worktree_registry_lifecycle_state is worktree_pending_removal_user_review_required, worktree_removed_metadata_only_admin_directory_pruned, or worktree_removed_filesystem_deleted_admin_directory_pruned. Null otherwise.

in_progress_history_operation_state_id_r.description: Opaque ref to the history_operation_state_record the worktree owns. Required (non-null) when worktree_registry_lifecycle_state is worktree_registered_active_with_in_progress_operation or worktree_registered_paused_pending_conflict; null otherwise.

exported_handoff_snapshot_ref.description: Opaque ref to the handoff snapshot the worktree was exported through. Required (non-null) when worktree_removal_class is worktree_removal_blocked_pending_export_for_handoff and the export has been minted; null otherwise.

approval_ticket_ref.description: Opaque ref to the approval-ticket row admitting the most recent topology-changing mutation. Required (non-null) on every removal action; nullable on registration.

command_id_ref.description: Opaque ref to the command-dispatch id under which the most recent mutation was invoked. Required (non-null) on every removal action.

archived_at.description: Required (non-null) when worktree_registry_lifecycle_state is worktree_archived_tombstone or one of the worktree_removed_* states. Null otherwise.

merge_conflict_class_record_id_ref.description: Forward-dependency slot reserved for the merge / conflict-class contract. Currently always null.

history_edit_recovery_record_id_ref.description: Forward-dependency slot reserved for the dedicated history-edit recovery contract. Currently always null.

allOf.description: worktree_registered_active_with_in_progress_operation MUST cite a non-null in_progress_history_operation_state_id_ref so the in-progress block is mechanically attributable.
worktree_registered_paused_pending_conflict MUST cite a non-null in_progress_history_operation_state_id_ref so the paused block is mechanically attributable.

worktree_pending_removal_user_review_required MUST cite a non-null worktree_removal_class and a worktree_removal_review_sheet_class other than review_sheet_not_applicable_no_removal_pending; a row that admits a generic 'remove' action without naming the removal class denies with worktree_removal_generic_action_forbidden.

worktree_removed_metadata_only_admin_directory_pruned MUST cite worktree_removal_class = worktree_removal_metadata_only_admin_directory_pruned; landing the removed lifecycle without the matching removal class denies with worktree_removal_class_required_for_removed_lifecycle.

worktree_removed_filesystem_deleted_admin_directory_pruned MUST cite worktree_removal_class = worktree_removal_filesystem_deletion_admin_directory_pruned; landing the removed lifecycle without the matching removal class denies with worktree_removal_class_required_for_removed_lifecycle.

worktree_removal_path_preserve_admin_directory_pruned_only MUST pair with review_sheet_path_preserve_explicit_user_acknowledgement_required so the user explicitly acknowledges the path-preserve posture.

worktree_archived_tombstone, worktree_removed_metadata_only_admin_directory_pruned, and worktree_removed_filesystem_deleted_admin_directory_pruned MUST cite a non-null archived_at; every other lifecycle state MUST cite null.

worktree_row_record.description: Row shape consumed by the worktree picker, the source-control panel, the worktree-aware status / removal review sheets, and the support / export bundle's git section. Exactly one row per worktree identity.

denial_reason.description: Required (non-null) when worktree_row_audit_event_id_value is worktree_row_audit_denial_emitted. Null otherwise.

allOf.description: denial_reason is required (non-null) when the event id is worktree_row_audit_denial_emitted and MUST be null otherwise.

worktree_row_audit_event_record.description: Audit-event row on the worktree_row stream.
